description_long: This is a large, heavy-duty sledgehammer with a robust, rectangular metallic head featuring beveled edges and a central circular emblem on each side. The head is solid and symmetrical, with pointed spikes protruding from the top, bottom, and both ends, giving it an aggressive, reinforced appearance. The handle is long, straight, and appears to be made of a dark, polished wood or composite material, capped at both ends with metallic collars for added durability. The lower end of the handle terminates in a pointed metal spike, mirroring the design of the hammerhead. The overall construction suggests it is designed for maximum impact and durability, suitable for demolition or heavy urban work. The surface finish is smooth with a slight sheen, and there are no visible signs of wear, branding, or additional attachments.
description: A heavy, spiked sledgehammer with a metallic rectangular head and a long, dark handle reinforced with metal collars. The design is robust and aggressive, suitable for heavy-duty urban tasks.
description_view_0: Front view shows the full width of the rectangular hammerhead with its central emblem and side spikes, as well as the straight handle and pointed base.
description_view_1: Side view reveals the narrow profile of the hammerhead and the alignment of the handle, highlighting the thickness and symmetry of the head.
description_view_2: Rear view mirrors the front, displaying the same emblem and spikes, with the handle and pointed base clearly visible.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, similar to view 1, showing the hammerhead's thickness and the straight alignment of the handle.
attribute_handle_type: Straight, dark wooden handle with metallic collars at both ends; smooth and cylindrical with no visible grip enhancements.
attribute_head_type: Rectangular sledgehammer head with beveled edges, central circular emblems, and pointed spikes on all four sides; designed for heavy impact.
